generated_oml:
instance WheelSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring rotational speed of vehicle wheels"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WheelSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance ChassisVibrationSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring structural vibrations in vehicle chassis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData ChassisVibrationDataTransmitted
]

instance StructuralStressSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring stress levels in vehicle structural elements"
    DTDFVocab:producedData StructuralStressDataTransmitted
]

instance WheelSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom WheelSpeedSensor
]

instance ChassisVibrationDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ChassisVibrationSensor
]

instance StructuralStressDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom StructuralStressSensor
]

instance WheelSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time rotational speed data from wheel sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData WheelSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo StateEstimatorAlgorithm
]

instance ChassisVibrationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time vibration data from chassis sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ChassisVibrationDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo StateEstimatorAlgorithm
]

instance StructuralStressData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time stress data from structural elements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData StructuralStressDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo StateEstimatorAlgorithm
]

instance GeometricModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD-based geometric representation of vehicle structure"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CADTool
]

instance AnalyticalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Differential equations modeling vehicle dynamic behavior"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo OptimizerAlgorithm
]

instance CADTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Computer-Aided Design tool for geometric modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]

instance FaultDetectorAlgorithm : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm for detecting faults in vehicle components"
    DTDFVocab:enables FaultDetectionService
]

instance SupervisoryControllerAlgorithm : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm for supervisory control of vehicle systems"
    DTDFVocab:enables ControlService
]

instance StateEstimatorAlgorithm : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm for estimating vehicle system states from sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelCalibrationService
]

instance OptimizerAlgorithm : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm for optimizing vehicle performance metrics"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation services to reproduce and predict Physical Twin behavior under current operating conditions"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveSimulationInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of safety and optimal performance through sensor data analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyMonitoringInsight
]

instance ModelCalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Model calibration using algorithms for parameter estimation"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelCalibrationInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Fault detection via specialized algorithms"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectionInsight
]

instance ControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Control via supervisory controllers"
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleControlAction
]

instance FaultDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of faults in vehicle components based on sensor data and models"
]

instance StateEstimationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Estimation of vehicle system states using sensor data and state estimators"
]

instance PerformanceOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimization of vehicle performance metrics through algorithmic analysis"
]

instance PredictiveSimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Prediction of Physical Twin behavior via simulation models"
]

instance SafetyMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Continuous assessment of safety conditions in the vehicle system"
]

instance ModelCalibrationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Parameter calibration insights for accurate model representation"
]

instance VehicleControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of vehicle parameters based on supervisory control"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance VehicleEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Environment containing vehicle components"
    base:contains Wheel, Chassis, StructuralElement
]

instance Wheel : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Vehicle wheel component"
]

instance Chassis : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Vehicle chassis structural component"
]

instance StructuralElement : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Structural element of the vehicle"
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Calibration algorithms adjust model parameters using sensor data to maintain fidelity with the Physical Twin. Monitors validate system performance against safety and optimization criteria, while fault detectors identify anomalies. Corrective actions are initiated by humans or algorithms upon violation detection."
]
